events.titleZh: Community planting for National Tree Day - Harold Park
events.titleEn: Community planting for National Tree Day - Harold Park
events.summaryZh: 在 Harold Park 帮忙种下原生草本和野花，孩子能把自然、昆虫和城市生态连接在一起看见；这是免费户外活动，适合愿意动手、穿好鞋子的家庭。
events.summaryEn: Families can help plant native grasses and wildflowers at Harold Park, turning National Tree Day into a practical outdoor lesson about pollinators, habitat and city ecology.
events.timeEn: Friday 24 July, 10:00am-12:00pm; finishes earlier if planting is complete
events.priceZh: 免费；需登记或现场报名
events.priceEn: Free; registration requested or register on the day
events.mapQuery: Harold Park Tramsheds Forest Lodge NSW
events.referenceZh: City of Sydney 官方活动页核实日期、地点、免费登记和儿童可参加说明。
events.referenceEn: City of Sydney official event page verified the date, place, free registration and children-welcome note.

events.titleZh: STS Young Endeavour Open Day at the Maritime Museum
events.titleEn: STS Young Endeavour Open Day at the Maritime Museum
events.summaryZh: 登上 STS Young Endeavour 看真正的航海训练船、见船员并了解青年航海项目；开放登船免费，适合把船只探索和海事博物馆一带散步组合成半日。
events.summaryEn: Step aboard the STS Young Endeavour, meet crew and hear how the youth sailing program works, making a free tall-ship visit easy to pair with Darling Harbour and the Maritime Museum.
events.placeZh: Australian National Maritime Museum, Darling Harbour
events.placeEn: Australian National Maritime Museum, Darling Harbour
events.priceZh: 登船免费；博物馆其他展览另购票
events.priceEn: Free ship boarding; museum exhibitions require separate tickets
events.mapQuery: Australian National Maritime Museum 2 Murray Street Sydney
events.referenceZh: City of Sydney 与 Australian National Maritime Museum 官方活动页核实 7月25日开放日、免费登船和家庭欢迎说明。
events.referenceEn: City of Sydney and Australian National Maritime Museum listing verified the 25 July open day, free boarding and family welcome.

events.summaryZh: QVB 一层的免费古典音乐快闪把钢琴和多种乐器带进公共空间，孩子不用坐完整场音乐厅也能接触现场演奏，大人顺路逛 city 也轻松。
events.summaryEn: This free QVB pop-up brings classical music into a public city space, giving children a low-pressure live-music stop while adults can fold it into a simple CBD outing.
events.mapQuery: Queen Victoria Building 455 George Street Sydney
events.referenceZh: City of Sydney 官方活动页核实每月第4个周六、免费、QVB 一层地点和主办方信息。
events.referenceEn: City of Sydney official event page verified the fourth-Saturday timing, free entry, QVB Level 1 location and organiser.

events.summaryZh: 皇家植物园的导览会带家庭认识古老针叶树家族和植物故事，结束还能带一棵小树回家；更适合想要安静学习型户外活动的亲子组合。
events.summaryEn: A guided Royal Botanic Garden walk introduces ancient conifers and plant stories, then sends visitors home with a young tree to plant, suited to families who like slower outdoor learning.
events.placeZh: Foundation & Friends Terrace, Royal Botanic Garden Sydney
events.placeEn: Foundation & Friends Terrace, Royal Botanic Garden Sydney
events.priceZh: 成人 $55；以官方预订页为准
events.priceEn: Adult $55; check the official booking page
events.mapQuery: Royal Botanic Garden Sydney Foundation and Friends Terrace
events.referenceZh: City of Sydney 官方活动页核实 7月26日、地点、票价和 Foundation and Friends 主办信息。
events.referenceEn: City of Sydney official event page verified 26 July, the venue, price and Foundation and Friends organiser details.

events.summaryZh: 在 Chinese Garden of Friendship 用水彩画友谊花卉书签、写下留言并加上流苏，活动包含在入园门票内，适合需要安静手作加园林散步的家庭。
events.summaryEn: Paint a floral friendship bookmark, write a message and finish it with a tassel inside the Chinese Garden, a calm creative stop that can sit beside a garden walk.
events.placeZh: Chinese Garden of Friendship, Darling Harbour
events.placeEn: Chinese Garden of Friendship, Darling Harbour
events.priceZh: 含在入园门票内；成人 $12、优惠 $8
events.priceEn: Included with garden entry; adult $12, concession $8
events.mapQuery: Chinese Garden of Friendship Pier Street Sydney
events.referenceZh: City of Sydney 与 Darling Harbour 官方活动信息核实 7月30日、时间、地点和入园票价。
events.referenceEn: City of Sydney and Darling Harbour official listing verified 30 July, time, location and garden-entry pricing.

events.tagZh: Prince Alfred Park · 社区种植
events.titleZh: Community planting for National Tree Day: Prince Alfred Park
events.titleEn: Community planting for National Tree Day: Prince Alfred Park
events.summaryZh: 在 Prince Alfred Park 帮忙种下原生草、草本和野花，活动有工作人员引导、免费且欢迎孩子参加，适合住 city 南侧或想顺路去 Surry Hills 的家庭。
events.summaryEn: Help plant native grasses, herbs and wildflowers at Prince Alfred Park with staff guidance, a free hands-on community outing for families near Surry Hills.
events.timeEn: Sunday 26 July, 10:00am-12:00pm; finishes earlier if planting is complete
events.priceZh: 免费；需登记或现场报名
events.priceEn: Free; registration requested or register on the day
events.mapQuery: Prince Alfred Park Chalmers Street Surry Hills NSW
events.referenceZh: City of Sydney 官方活动页核实 7月26日、免费登记、儿童欢迎和 planting site 信息。
events.referenceEn: City of Sydney official event page verified 26 July, free registration, children-welcome note and planting-site details.

events.summaryZh: Australian Museum 的吸血生物展用互动装置、显微镜和可触摸模型解释蚊子、水蛭等生物，比普通看展更适合喜欢自然科学和有点怪趣味的孩子。
events.summaryEn: Australian Museum's exhibition uses interactives, microscopes and touchable models to explain mosquitoes, leeches and other blood-feeders, ideal for curious science-minded families.
events.timeEn: Daily this week, 10:00am-4:00pm; exhibition runs until 11 October
events.referenceZh: City of Sydney 与 Australian Museum 官方活动页核实展期、开放时间、票价和家庭适用说明。
events.referenceEn: City of Sydney and Australian Museum listing verified the exhibition dates, hours, pricing and family focus.

events.tagZh: Art Gallery NSW · 艺术游乐场
events.titleZh: Mike Hewson: The Key's Under the Mat
events.titleEn: Mike Hewson: The Key's Under the Mat
events.summaryZh: AGNSW 的 Tank 被改造成可进入、可停留、可玩耍的艺术公园，有秋千、攀爬和水区元素；免费且全龄友好，适合把美术馆变成半日探索。
events.summaryEn: AGNSW's Tank becomes a playable art park with swings, climbing, water elements and places to dwell, making the gallery feel like a free all-ages exploration space.
events.timeZh: 本周开放；周一、周二、周四至周日 10:00am-5:00pm，周三至10:00pm
events.timeEn: Open this week; Mon, Tue and Thu-Sun 10:00am-5:00pm, Wed until 10:00pm
events.mapQuery: Art Gallery of NSW Art Gallery Road Sydney
events.referenceZh: City of Sydney 与 Art Gallery of NSW 官方活动页核实展期、开放时间、免费和全龄说明。
events.referenceEn: City of Sydney and Art Gallery of NSW listing verified dates, opening hours, free entry and all-ages suitability.
